name_cn:
Top-tier ZIPPY VERTICAL Wallet
M63095
This men's vertical zip wallet is made of durable Damier Graphite canvas with an elegant look. Multiple practical pockets and compartments easily hold cash, credit cards, and change. 20x10cm.
